mapper.insert: insert into batch.alert_routing_config ( tenant_id, route_code, route_name, team, alert_group, severity, receiver, group_by, group_wait_seconds, group_interval_seconds, repeat_interval_seconds, enabled, description, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{p.tenantId}, #{p.routeCode}, #{p.routeName}, #{p.team}, #{p.alertGroup}, #{p.severity}, #{p.receiver}, #{p.groupBy}, #{p.groupWaitSeconds}, #{p.groupIntervalSeconds}, #{p.repeatIntervalSeconds}, #{p.enabled}, #{p.description}, #{p.createdBy}, #{p.updatedBy}, current_timestamp, current_timestamp ) on conflict (tenant_id, route_code) do update set route_name = excluded.route_name, team = excluded.team, alert_group = excluded.alert_group, severity = excluded.severity, receiver = excluded.receiver, group_by = excluded.group_by, group_wait_seconds = excluded.group_wait_seconds, group_interval_seconds = excluded.group_interval_seconds, repeat_interval_seconds = excluded.repeat_interval_seconds, enabled = excluded.enabled, description = excluded.description, updated_by = excluded.updated_by, is_deleted = false, updated_at = current_timestamp
mapper.update: update batch.alert_routing_config set route_code = #{p.routeCode}, route_name = #{p.routeName}, team = #{p.team}, alert_group = #{p.alertGroup}, severity = #{p.severity}, receiver = #{p.receiver}, group_by = #{p.groupBy}, group_wait_seconds = #{p.groupWaitSeconds}, group_interval_seconds = #{p.groupIntervalSeconds}, repeat_interval_seconds = #{p.repeatIntervalSeconds}, enabled = #{p.enabled}, description = #{p.description}, updated_by = #{p.updatedBy}, updated_at = current_timestamp where tenant_id = #{p.tenantId} and id = #{p.id} and is_deleted = false
